title: Lovely Moon Katana
description: Rename your sword "Lovely moon" to make it a katana.
body:
Simple resource pack that changes sword texture by renaming it to "Lovely moon". Original model by [PeploQuoji]([https://modrinth.com/user/PeploQuoji](https://modrinth.com/user/PeploQuoji))
, recolored to purple by Me. Requires [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn).
